title: Perform a Rolling Update
description:
## Perform a Rolling Update

A Deployment named `app-v1` is running `nginx:1.24`. Your team needs to upgrade it to `nginx:1.25`.

**Your task:**

Update the image of the `app-v1` deployment to `nginx:1.25` using a rolling update strategy. Ensure all replicas are running the new image.

```bash
# Hint: kubectl set image can update an image in-place
kubectl set image deployment/<name> <container>=<image>
```

hints.title: Set a new image on a Deployment
hints.body: Use `kubectl set image deployment/<name> <container-name>=<new-image>` to trigger a rolling update.

hints.title: Check rollout progress
hints.body: Monitor the rollout with `kubectl rollout status`. Once complete, all pods will run the new image.

commands.command: kubectl get deployment app-v1 -o jsonpath='{.status.readyReplicas}' 2>/dev/null | grep -v '^$' || echo 0
